reviews.review_description: It's OK don't give me mod

This game ngl is one of the best gorilla tag fan games! I actually met a moderator the other day who was really friendly- he showed me the ropes of the game and I really hope this game gets somewhere in the near future and wish you all the luck you need!

Ps: my name was hiiii for the moderators…. I’d love to be a mod but I don’t have discord! Thankyou!

Edit: please add stump back! :D
#ifyoudonthavestumpyouneedathump


Oh my god im so cringe xd

So it’s been 4 months since I wrote this review. I’ve been on starverse a couple times since and I was just wondering if the revamp is still in effect or if it’s just got cancelled. My advice although I’m not an expert lol, maybe expand your socials because honestly this game would get somewhere if it had more players and engagement, thanks for your time guys and peace out.

developer_response.body: Tysm! We will take your feedback, we are currently in the stage of revamping the game. Thank you so much for your feedback though.

developer_response.body: very sorry, but i saw you doing it.
